title: Evaluation of Concrete Equipment Rental Management System: Digital Solution for Rental of Mixer Trucks, Pump Trucks, and Mixing Stations | 2026 Evaluation
description: In-depth evaluation of the concrete equipment leasing management system, analysis of the leasing process of mixer trucks, pump trucks, and mixing stations to help leasing companies achieve professional management of concrete equipment. Learn more about features and price comparisons to find the plan that's right for you! Professional reviews to help you make decisions!
content:
Speciality of the concrete equipment rental market

Concrete equipment is a professional segment of the construction machinery rental market. The number of concrete equipment in the Chinese market: more than 200,000 mixer trucks, more than 50,000 pump trucks, and more than 10,000 mixing stations. The demand for concrete equipment rental is concentrated in: real estate projects, infrastructure projects, bridge construction, and tunnel construction.

There are various types of concrete equipment: mixer trucks (concrete mixer trucks, capacity 6-12 cubic meters), pump trucks (concrete pump trucks, arm length 37-56 meters), mixing stations (concrete mixing stations, capacity 60-240 cubic meters per hour), batching machines (concrete batching machines). Differences in the characteristics of different types of leasing: mixer trucks have a short leasing period (1-7 days), strong liquidity, and fragmented demand; pump trucks have a short leasing period (1-7 days), arm length matching is critical, and operator staffing is critical; mixing stations have a long leasing period (>6 months), fixed installation, and capacity matching.

Pain points of concrete equipment rental: time-sensitive (short concrete solidification time, strict mixer truck transportation time, pump truck pouring time), complex equipment matching (mixer truck capacity matching, pump truck arm length matching, mixing station capacity matching), operator staffing ( Mixer truck driver, pump truck operator, mixing station operator), high maintenance costs (mixer truck tank cleaning, pump truck boom maintenance, mixing station equipment maintenance), insufficient utilization (mixer truck utilization rate <50%, pump truck utilization rate <60%, mixing station utilization rate <70%).

The concrete equipment rental management system is designed to address the above pain points. Core functions: concrete equipment asset management, concrete equipment leasing and scheduling, concrete equipment contract management, concrete equipment operator management, concrete equipment maintenance management, concrete equipment utilization analysis, and concrete equipment customer management.

Tool 1: ConcreteRent Pro - a dedicated rental platform for concrete equipment

ConcreteRent Pro focuses on concrete equipment rental management and serves customers including concrete equipment rental companies, concrete mixing stations, and concrete transportation companies. The system design has a deep understanding of the characteristics of concrete equipment rental.

Concrete equipment asset management: Complete equipment files: equipment number, brand model (SANY, XCMG, Zoomlion), type classification (mixer truck, pump truck, mixing station, batching machine), specifications (mixer truck capacity, pump truck arm length, mixing station capacity), purchase date, purchase cost, depreciation plan, accumulated depreciation, net value, insurance information, GPS positioning (mixer truck, pump truck), installation location (mixing station). Equipment status visualization: Dashboard displays equipment distribution map and equipment status color identification (green available, yellow under lease, red under maintenance).

Concrete equipment leasing and scheduling: intelligent matching of the scheduling engine: customer needs are entered (equipment type, specification requirements, project location, rental period), the system automatically matches the available equipment, and the optimal scheduling plan is generated. Mixer truck scheduling: transportation time calculation, concrete solidification time constraints, scheduling path optimization. Pump truck scheduling: arm length matching, pouring time calculation, operator allocation. Mixing station scheduling: capacity matching, installation time planning, debugging time reservation. Scheduling time constraints: concrete solidification time constraints, system calculation transportation time, pouring time, early warning time exceed limit.

Concrete equipment contract management: Contract template classification: mixer truck contract template (simplified terms, short-term lease, transportation terms), pump truck contract template (standard terms, short-term lease, operator terms), mixing station contract template (complex terms, long-term lease, installation terms, capacity terms). Automation of contract generation: pre-filling of customer information, pre-filling of equipment information, automatic application of contract terms, and integration of electronic signatures. Contract change process: lease renewal, lease exchange, early return, delayed return, dispute resolution.

Concrete equipment operator management: operator files: basic information of operators, driving license (mixer truck driver), operating license (pump truck operator), and historical operating records. Operator scheduling: Match operating qualifications and assign operator tasks based on equipment type. Operator training: operation training plan, training records, training certificate update.

Concrete equipment maintenance management: Maintenance plan: mixer tank cleaning (daily cleaning), pump truck boom maintenance (weekly inspection), mixing station equipment maintenance (monthly maintenance). Maintenance work order: maintenance work order creation, maintenance execution record, maintenance acceptance confirmation. Maintenance cost tracking: maintenance cost records, cost analysis.

Concrete equipment utilization analysis: utilization calculation: equipment operating hours ÷ available hours. Utilization rate is divided into types: comparison of mixer truck utilization rate, pump truck utilization rate, and mixing station utilization rate. Utilization trends: historical utilization curves, seasonal utilization fluctuations. Utilization optimization: identification of devices with utilization below the threshold and optimization recommendations.

Concrete equipment customer management: customer profile: customer type (real estate developers, infrastructure projects, contractors), customer size, customer demand preferences (equipment type, specification requirements). Customer rental history: rental equipment type, number of rentals, rental period, rental amount. Customer demand forecast: predict future customer demand based on historical data.

Deployment method: Cloud SaaS subscription. Pricing is based on the number of devices: the monthly fee for the basic version is US$15/device (<50 units), the monthly fee for the professional version is US$12/device (50-200 units), and the monthly fee for the enterprise version is US$10/device (>200 units). Free trial period is 60 days.

Technical support: online chat and phone support, response time averages 1 hour. Training support includes concrete equipment rental process training and system training. Chinese customer service team support.

Limitations: The system focuses on concrete equipment, and management of other equipment types is not supported. Basics of data analysis functions. Limited third-party integrations.

Tool 2: MixerTruck Manager - Dedicated management of mixer trucks

MixerTruck Manager focuses on mixer truck rental management and is designed for mixer truck liquidity and time sensitivity. The core advantage is the optimization of mixer truck transport time.

Mixer truck asset management: mixer truck files: mixer truck number, capacity (6 cubic meters, 8 cubic meters, 10 cubic meters, 12 cubic meters), brand model, purchase date, GPS positioning, tank status. Real-time mixer truck status: GPS real-time positioning, tank loading status (empty, full, in transit).

Mixer truck rental scheduling: transportation time calculation: mixing station location, project location, transportation distance, transportation time calculation. Concrete solidification time constraints: concrete solidification time (2-3 hours), transportation time constraints, early warning transportation time exceeds the limit. Scheduling path optimization: multiple locations of mixing stations, multiple project locations, system optimization of scheduling paths, and reduction of transportation costs. Real-time dispatching: Mixer truck dispatching is updated in real time, and customers can check the dispatching status in real time.

Mixer truck contract management: contract template: short-term rental (1-7 days) contract template, transportation terms (transportation distance, transportation time constraints). Contract generation is completed with one click: customer information is pre-filled, mixer truck information is pre-filled, and the contract is generated with one click.

Mixer truck operator management: Mixer truck driver profile: driver’s basic information, driver’s license, historical transportation records. Driver scheduling: Mixer trucks match drivers and driver task assignments.

Mixer truck maintenance management: tank cleaning: daily tank cleaning reminder and cleaning records. Vehicle maintenance: monthly vehicle maintenance reminders and maintenance records.

Analysis of mixer truck utilization: real-time calculation of utilization: real-time statistics of mixer truck transportation times and real-time display of utilization. Utilization comparison: Utilization comparison and utilization ranking of different mixer trucks.

Mobile experience: Mobile App supports iOS and Android. Mobile terminal for the entire mixer truck rental process: customer demand entry, mixer truck viewing, contract signing, payment, and real-time viewing of transportation status. Mobile terminal for mixer truck drivers: receiving transportation tasks, navigating transportation routes, and updating transportation status.

Deployment method: Pure cloud SaaS subscription. The pricing is friendly to the people: the monthly fee for the basic version is US$5/mixer truck (<30 units), the monthly fee for the professional version is US$4/mixer truck (30-100 units), and the monthly fee for the enterprise version is US$3/mixer truck (>100 units). Free trial period is 90 days.

Applicable companies: Mixer truck rental companies, concrete transportation companies, and companies with mixer truck liquidity needs.

Limitations: Only mixer trucks are supported, pump trucks and mixing stations are not supported. Simplified functionality. Data analysis simplified.

Tool 3: PumpTruck Manager - Dedicated management of pump trucks

PumpTruck Manager focuses on pump truck rental management and is designed for pump truck arm length matching and operator staffing. The core advantage is the intelligent matching of pump truck arm length.

Pump truck asset management: Pump truck files: pump truck number, arm length (37 meters, 42 meters, 47 meters, 56 meters), brand model, purchase date, GPS positioning, boom status. Real-time status of the pump truck: GPS real-time positioning, boom status (arm retracted, expanded, pouring).

Pump truck rental scheduling: arm length matching: project pouring height, pump truck arm length matching, system recommended optimal arm length. Pouring time calculation: Concrete pouring volume, pouring speed, pouring time calculation. Operator staffing: pump truck operator profile, operator scheduling, operator task assignment. Real-time dispatching: pump truck dispatching is updated in real time, and customers can check the dispatching status in real time.

Pump truck contract management: contract template: short-term rental (1-7 days) contract template, operator terms (operator equipment, operator fees). Contract generation is completed with one click.

Pump truck operator management: Pump truck operator files: operator basic information, operation certificate, and historical operation records. Operator scheduling: Pump trucks are matched with operators and operator tasks are assigned. Operator training: operational training plan, training records.

Pump truck maintenance management: boom maintenance: weekly boom inspection reminders and inspection records. Vehicle maintenance: monthly vehicle maintenance reminders and maintenance records.

Pump truck utilization analysis: real-time calculation of utilization rate: real-time statistics of pump truck pouring times and real-time display of utilization rate. Utilization comparison: Utilization comparison and utilization ranking of different pump trucks.

Mobile experience: Mobile App supports iOS and Android. The entire pump truck rental process is on mobile. Pump truck operator mobile terminal: receiving pouring tasks and updating pouring status.

Deployment method: Pure cloud SaaS subscription. The pricing is user-friendly: the monthly fee for the basic version is US$10 per pump truck (<20 units), the monthly fee for the professional version is US$8 per pump truck (20-50 units), and the monthly fee for the enterprise version is US$6 per pump truck (>50 units). Free trial period is 90 days.

Applicable companies: pump truck rental companies, concrete pouring companies, and companies with pump truck arm length matching needs.

Limitations: Only pump trucks are supported, mixer trucks and mixing stations are not supported. Simplified functionality. Data analysis simplified.

Concrete equipment rental management trend forecast in 2026

Trend 1: Popularization of AI transportation time optimization

AI algorithm is applied to mixer truck transportation time optimization: transportation route optimization, transportation time prediction, and concrete solidification time early warning. AI optimization reduces transportation costs by 15-20% and reduces the risk of concrete solidification. The AI ​​transportation module will be standard in the mixer truck management system in 2026.

Trend 2: The rise of electric concrete equipment rental management

The market share of electric mixer trucks and electric pump trucks has increased, and rental management needs to adapt to the characteristics of electric concrete equipment: battery life management, charging station scheduling, and carbon emission tracking. Electric concrete equipment rental module: battery status monitoring, charging plan, battery life prediction, carbon emission calculation. ESG compliance: priority recommendation of electric concrete equipment, carbon emission report. The electric concrete equipment module will be standard in mainstream systems in 2026.

Trend 3: Platform-based concrete equipment rental

The rental of mixer trucks and pump trucks has shifted from traditional rental to platform-based: a concrete equipment rental platform similar to the Uber model, where customers place orders online, equipment is quickly matched, automatic dispatching, and online payment. Platformization lowers leasing thresholds, expands customer base, and improves utilization rates. The concrete equipment platform will be piloted in first-tier cities in 2026.

Trend 4: IoT concrete equipment health monitoring

IoT sensors are applied to concrete equipment: mixer tank sensors, pump truck boom sensors, and mixing station equipment sensors. Real-time monitoring of concrete equipment health: operating status, fault warning, and health score. IoT health monitoring will be standard on large concrete equipment in 2026.

Trend 5: Digitization of the concrete pouring process

Digitalization of the concrete pouring process: real-time statistics of pouring volume, monitoring of pouring quality, and visualization of pouring progress. Digital pouring records: complete pouring data records and pouring quality reports. The digital pouring module will be piloted in high-end systems in 2026.

Selection Decision Guide

The selection of concrete equipment rental management system requires a comprehensive evaluation of equipment type, rental scale, business complexity, and budget:

  • Full-type concrete equipment rental enterprises (>50 units of equipment): Choose ConcreteRent Pro. The dedicated functions for concrete equipment are complete and all equipment types are supported. Monthly fee is US$12-15/device.
  • Mixer truck rental companies (mainly mixer trucks): Select MixerTruck Manager. Dedicated to mixer trucks, transportation time optimization, liquidity management, mobile first. The monthly fee is US$3-5/mixer truck.
  • Pump truck rental companies (mainly pump trucks): Select PumpTruck Manager. Dedicated to pump trucks, arm length matching, operator allocation, and mobile terminal priority. The monthly fee is US$6-10/pump truck.
  • Mixing station rental companies (mainly mixing stations): Choose ConcreteRent Pro. In-depth mixing station management, capacity matching, and installation management.
  • Businesses with time-sensitive needs: Choose MixerTruck Manager or ConcreteRent Pro. Transportation time optimization and solidification time warning.

Implementation critical path: The first stage (1-2 months) completes equipment asset management, leasing, scheduling and configuration. The second stage (3-4 months) is contract management, operator management, and maintenance management. The third stage (5-6 months) utilization analysis, customer management, and employee training. Continue to iteratively upgrade and follow the trends of AI and electric concrete equipment.

The concrete equipment rental management system is a key tool for professional management and utilization optimization of concrete equipment. Choosing the appropriate solution and building a management platform for concrete equipment asset management, intelligent scheduling, contract management, operator management, and maintenance management are the core strategies for improving corporate competitiveness. In 2026, the window period for AI transportation optimization and electric concrete equipment technology to mature, pioneers will gain transportation advantages and environmental protection advantages. Hesitation to wait and see will come at the cost of shipping risks and low utilization. Action determines effectiveness.
author: Concrete Equipment Rental Digital Research Center
